top_signals.title: Hormuz Reopening Seen Unleashing Pent-Up Gulf Grain Demand
top_signals.summary: An interim US-Iran deal to end their months-long war and potentially fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz is likely to trigger a rush of grain imports to nations in the Persian Gulf after months of reliance on longer, less efficient routes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dolce & Gabbana Weighs Sale of Milan Properties to Raise Cash
top_signals.summary: Dolce & Gabbana is negotiating with lenders over the potential sale of real estate assets in Milan as part of an effort to raise liquidity and refinance debt, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bondholders Forced to Reckon With $4 Billion Tax Threat in Bitter Credit Feud
top_signals.summary: Patrick Drahi was running out of options to save his debt-ridden telecom empire.

top_signals.title: Verizon Debuts New Plan, Loyalty Program in Battle for Customers
top_signals.summary: The freebies competition is heating up among US wireless carriers.
